question.title: 1538. Maximum Points You Can Obtain from Cards

notes:
Calculate sum of k sized subarray from left, then keep track of max as we reduce one element from the left subarray and keep adding one from right, return the max.

Alternate approach: Use sliding window of sized n-k, find subarray with min. sum and return (total sum) - (min. sum)

enrichment.realTitle: 1538. Maximum Points You Can Obtain from Cards
